title: HDFC Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HDFC Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Bank:
HDFC Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Bank!
